task.prompt: Perform a security audit on src/auth.ts and src/api.ts. Identify any authentication or authorization vulnerabilities including: SQL injection, XSS, authentication bypasses, insecure token handling, privilege escalation risks, and session management issues. For each vulnerability found, provide: severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), description, affected code location, and recommended fix.
task.context: This code is scheduled for production deployment. A security review is required.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Identifies auth bypass in admin route
